title: Ancient Obelisks
description: Find the obelisks and conquer their challenges!
body:
Looting chests now has a chance to spawn an Ancient Obelisk instead!

Each obelisk holds a map that be sacrificed to the obelisk to enter its dimension.

![Obelisk](https://i.ibb.co/gJgB52n/icon.png)

Features:

1) Obelisk Maps

![map](https://i.ibb.co/dj3znXT/map.png)

Items which specify the challenge level of the obelisk:

    The amount of waves 
    The strength of the mobs
    Mob Affixes

2) Obelisk Dimension

Enter the obelisk to start the trial. Mobs will start rapidly spawning in the arena. The more mobs you kill, the better the rewards you get at the end!

When the mob waves end, the reward chests will spawn which contain valuable items that can be crafted into Orbs that modify your next obelisk map, increasing the rewards and challenge further.
